response: A deflated yellow football needs to be placed into one of three holes: a star, a square, or a circle. Which one should you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a deflated yellow football. Put it into one of these holes: the star-shaped one, the square one, or the round one. Which one?
